basic_details.job_title: CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR - Central Food Technological Research Institute, Mysuru
basic_details.short_information: CSIR - Central Food Technological Research Institute, Mysuru (CSIR CFTRI) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 20 July 2026 on the official website https://cftri.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 05 years, OBC: 03 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Fisheries Science/ Zoology /Marine Biology / Biochemistry / Food Science and Technology / Nutrition from recognized University, Master's Degree in Fish Processing Technology / Food Science and Technology / Zoology / Marine Biotechnology / Biochemistry with hands-on expertise in protein/peptide purification, biochemical analysis (desirable)
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree in Fisheries Science/ Zoology /Marine Biology / Biochemistry / Food Science and Technology / Nutrition from recognized University Master's Degree in Fish Processing Technology / Food Science and Technology / Zoology / Marine Biotechnology / Biochemistry with hands-on expertise in protein/peptide purification, biochemical analysis (desirable)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant positions is 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Fisheries Science, Zoology, Marine Biology, Biochemistry, Food Science and Technology, or Nutrition. A Master's Degree in Fish Processing Technology, Food Science and Technology, Zoology, Marine Biotechnology, or Biochemistry with relevant expertise is also considered.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/PwBD/Women (05 years) and OBC (03 years) candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How is the selection process conducted for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview. Candidates are advised to prepare thoroughly for both stages.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position is a contractual role. This means the appointment is for a fixed tenure, as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q8. Where is CSIR CFTRI located?
faq.answer: CSIR – Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI) is located in Mysuru, Karnataka, with the pincode 570020.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any state-wise restrictions for application. Candidates from all recognized universities meeting the eligibility criteria are encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are typically required during the application process?
faq.answer: Candidates are generally required to upload their photograph, signature, and relevant educational and experience certificates in the prescribed format. It is advisable to check the official notification for a precise list of required documents.
